name: 橘猫猫的幻想
short_description: no English Translation. This is a game to develop the heroine of the cat world, relying on mouse clicks to play. The main function is to watch the story, choose the schedule, and participate in the game, and finally usher in different endings.
detailed_description:
no English Translation.
This is a game to develop the heroine of the cat world, relying on mouse clicks to play. The main function is to watch the story, choose the schedule, and participate in the game, and finally usher in different endings.

Main functions:

  • Attributes: The main character's name and constellation (influence attributes) and other attributes are displayed, and the likeability with each NPC is reflected.
  • Go out: shopping and trigger plot, unlock work, etc.
  • Equipment: affects adventure, race functions, etc.
  • Clothes: clothes can be worn for purchase, clothes are constantly updated, attributes affect the ending and matches, etc.
  • Schedule: Each day's itinerary can increase or decrease the corresponding attributes, affecting the outcome.
  • Plot: Main plot according to time; There are also six sub-plots.
  • Activities: Competitions, adventures, etc.

Feature:

  • Lovely painting style.
  • Cute interaction with Orange cat ~
  • Diverse features (adventures, races, constellation effects, etc.).
  • A large plot.
  • Characters that change over time have grown.
